# Deployment


## Deploy with Docker

Running iii via the official image: single container, Compose for development, Compose for
production.

## Configure a reverse proxy

Terminate TLS in front of iii with Caddy or Nginx, routing HTTP, WebSocket, and stream traffic to
the right ports.

## Harden for production

Read-only filesystem, dropped capabilities, no-new-privileges, and non-root user for the iii
container.

## Run multiple engine instances

Load balancing, shared backing services, and distributed locks when scaling iii horizontally.

## Check engine health

Prometheus metrics endpoint and HTTP/WebSocket health checks for monitoring a running engine.

## Run an ephemeral worker

Pattern for one-shot SDK worker processes that connect, process a task, and gracefully shut down.
Well-suited for serverless containers and Kubernetes Jobs.

## iii Cloud deployments

Manage hosted iii deployments via the `iii cloud` command.
